headline: Jim Cramer on HCA Healthcare: “I Want You to Buy It Only in Big Clumps”
summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) is one of the stocks mentioned during the show, as we cover everything Jim Cramer said about the market. Inquiring about the stock, a caller pointed out that the company is the “largest hospital operator,” benefits from an aging population, and has accelerating EPS. Cramer replied: We have liked HCA for […]
